text: To prevent the spread of fire by conduction, you should:

options.text: A) Cool the bulkheads around the fire
B) Remove combustibles from direct exposure
C) Close all openings to the area
D) Shut off all electric power

explanation: Conduction transfers heat through solid materials like steel bulkheads. Cooling these bulkheads with water absorbs the heat and prevents the fire from reaching adjacent compartments.
